title: The Largest Fiber-Diabetes Trial in Years Found No Benefit. Then They Looked at the Microbiome.
description: A 2025 randomized trial of 802 prediabetic patients found that eating more fiber didn't significantly lower blood sugar — until researchers stratified by gut microbiome composition, and the results split dramatically. The 'eat more fiber' prescription isn't wrong. It's just aimed at the wrong unit of analysis: the population, not the person.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for The Largest Fiber-Diabetes Trial in Years Found No Benefit. Then They Looked at the Microbiome.
